scenarios.description: children() with userData having childElsKey but missing childElsMod forces fresh filterNodes path
scenarios.precondition: parent has one Element child; attributes().userData contains jsoup.childElsKey but no jsoup.childElsMod
scenarios.expectedResult: children() returns actual child list of size 1 despite cache key present
pseudocode: TEST TC11 children missing-mod triggers fresh list
// inject only key, no mod to force cache miss

scenarios.description: children() second call uses cachedChildren branch after real stashChildren from first call
scenarios.precondition: parent has two Element children; no manual userData injection before first call
scenarios.expectedResult: first children() returns two children, second children() returns same two-element list from cache
pseudocode: TEST TC13 children real cache hit on second call
assert first == second; // same cached instance
